3224290.name: Burger Bois
3224290.description:
Life got you in a pickle? Are you always hanging on ’til fry-day? Got beef?

Burger Bois is a food truck simulator game about flavor, not labor. Play as Patty, the accidental owner of a failing bespoke burger business, and launch your new career as the owner-operator of a designer burger truck. Get the vibe for each customer, and design unique sandwiches from start to finish, crafting your customers’ most vague requests into culinary masterpieces.

💡 Dream Up

No menu? No problem!

Customers will tell you the flavors, properties, and restrictions that you have to work with. It’s your job to create a bespoke burger that speaks to their stomach and soul.

🍔 Dish Up

Your customers will pay based on how well you satisfied their cravings. Don’t mess it up too badly, or you might not recoup your costs!

Form relationships with regular customers and follow their stories as you serve up burgers that make or break their days.

🚚 Park Up

Acquire exciting new ingredients, promote your small business, and impress your customers to maximize your reputation on Welp.

As your burger business moves up the rankings you'll unlock more lucrative parking spots, each with fresh types of ingredients for sale. Take your burger truck from a dingy parking lot to a beachside boardwalk to a less dingy parking lot - sticking it to your Corporate Hospitality Business RivalTM, collecting hidden #FoodPics, and meeting new delightfully weird customers along the way!

---

Burger Bois is a love letter to food and hospitality, with nods to many of our favorite games. We wanted to combine the food service of Good Pizza, Great Pizza, with the creative challenge of Sticky Business, and the quirky, comedic characters of Ace Attorney. 

Key features:

  • Food prep is out. Flavor design is in. Consider the real-world properties and flavors of ingredients to design uniquely satisfying burgers.

  • Who needs a menu anyway? Interpret increasingly vague requests to try and impress your customers.

  • Let’s get experimental. Play with your food to collect over 20 elusive #FoodPic illustrations, lovingly crafted by indie artists like @sharkeesart, @nautilics and Lucy Mutimer.

  • We’re all weird here. Get to know a cast of relatably weird friends, enemies, and customers (who are sometimes also enemies).

  • Lightheartedly cutthroat competition. Manage your truck and boost your reputation to score the hottest parking spots in town and show your rival who's boss!

  • Flavor made real. Share your creations with friends—and even export the recipes so you can taste-test for yourself.
